parameters.message:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  type: 'sync_update',
  partyId: $json.partyId,
  syncId: $json.syncId,
  action: $json.action,
  masterClock: $json.masterClock,
  targetVideoTime: $json.expectedVideoTime || $json.videoTime,
  syncOffset: $json.syncOffset || 0,
  drift: $json.drift || 0,
  networkLatency: $json.networkLatency || 0,
  timestamp: Date.now(),
  participants: $json.masterClock.participantCount
}) }}

parameters.columns: sync_id, party_id, user_id, stream_id, action, drift_ms, network_latency_ms, video_time, sync_quality, participant_count, created_at

sync_watchparty.name: cylive_sync_watchparty
sync_watchparty.description: Synchronize watch party video playback across all participants

videoTime.description: Current video playback time in seconds

get_watchparty_status.name: cylive_get_watchparty_status
get_watchparty_status.description: Get current watch party synchronization status
